admin.title: Super Admin Dashboard
admin.subTitle: Overview of MitaKurd for WhatsApp Auto
admin.accountsSubTitle: Manage and monitor all tenant accounts
admin.plansSubTitle: Manage pricing plans and usage limits

dashboard.subtitle: Here is what is happening in your account today

inbox.title: Chat Inbox
inbox.selectChat: Select a conversation to start messaging

settings.title: General Settings
settings.subTitle: Manage your account preferences, billing, and integrations
settings.telegramDescription: Link your own Telegram bot to receive instant notifications when a new appointment booking or order arrives from your WhatsApp customers.
settings.telegramTestSuccess: Test message sent successfully! Check your Telegram.
settings.telegramHowToToken: Open @BotFather on Telegram → Send /newbot → Copy the Token.
settings.telegramHowToChatId: Open @userinfobot on Telegram → Send any message → It will reply with your Chat ID.
settings.telegramHowToStart: ⚠️ Make sure you started a conversation with the bot by pressing /start before testing.

status.metaDesc: Your access token authenticates with Meta. See Registration status below for whether webhooks are actually wired.
status.notConnectedDesc: Configure your Meta API credentials below to connect your WhatsApp Business account.

meta.registeredTitle: Registered — Meta will deliver events to wacrm
meta.notRegisteredTitle: Not registered — Meta will not deliver events
meta.verifyPrompt: Click Verify with Meta if events stop arriving.
meta.pinRetryPrompt: Enter (or correct) the 2-step PIN below and click Save Configuration to retry.
meta.oldConfigPrompt: This number was saved before registration tracking existed, or registration was skipped. Enter the 2-step PIN below and click Save Configuration to subscribe it.
meta.apiCredentialsDesc: Enter your Meta WhatsApp Business API credentials.
meta.tokenHidden: Token is hidden for security. Re-enter it to update configuration.
meta.verifyTokenHint: A custom string you create. Must match the token you set in Meta webhook settings.
meta.pinHint: Required the first time you connect a number, and any time you swap to a different number. Leave blank to keep an existing registration untouched.
meta.webhookDesc: Use this URL as your webhook callback in the Meta App Dashboard.

evolution.title: Evolution API Settings
evolution.desc: Enter your Evolution instance credentials to connect your phone via QR Code.
evolution.apiUrlPlaceholder: e.g. https://evolution.mycrm.com (Leave blank for default server)
evolution.webhookDesc: Please configure the following webhook URL in Evolution settings (MESSAGES_UPSERT event).
evolution.qrTitle: Scan QR Code to Link Phone
evolution.qrInstructions: Open WhatsApp on your phone → Linked Devices → Link a Device → Point camera at screen.
evolution.pollingStatus: Checking connection status automatically every 3 seconds...
evolution.fetchingQrSub: This may take a few seconds
evolution.updateWebhookTooltip: Run this after deploying to a public domain to ensure message delivery
evolution.connectedSuccess: WhatsApp connected successfully via Evolution API!
evolution.instanceAndPhoneRequired: Instance Name and Phone Number are required
evolution.tokenRequiredInitial: Instance Token is required for initial setup
evolution.reenterToken: Please re-enter Instance Token to save changes
evolution.sessionCreatedQr: Session prepared! Scan QR Code to connect your phone.
evolution.webhookSetError: Failed to set Webhook on Evolution server

toasts.tokenRequiredInitial: Access Token is required for initial setup
toasts.reenterToken: Please re-enter the Access Token to save changes
toasts.metaRegisterFailed: Saved, but Meta couldn't register the number:
toasts.connectedGeneral: WhatsApp connected. Events will start flowing within a minute.
toasts.testFailed: Connection test failed. Check network and try again.
toasts.verifyEndpointError: Could not reach the verification endpoint.
toasts.resetConfirm: This will delete the current WhatsApp configuration. Continue?
toasts.resetSuccess: Configuration cleared. You can now re-enter your credentials.

instructions.title: Setup Instructions
instructions.desc: Follow these steps to connect your WhatsApp Business API.
instructions.step1_4: Fill in app details and create
instructions.step2_1: In your app dashboard, click "Add Product"
instructions.step2_3: Follow the setup wizard to link your business
instructions.step3_3: Copy your WhatsApp Business Account ID
instructions.step3_4: Generate a Permanent Access Token from Business Settings > System Users
instructions.step4_3: Paste the Webhook Callback URL from above
instructions.step4_4: Enter the same Verify Token you set here
